title: Graph-Based Code Generation
scenario: Write a code snippet that generates a graph data structure based on a set of input parameters. The code should use a specific graph library and include at least three different graph operations.
constraints: Must use a specific graph library (e.g. NetworkX)
Must include at least three graph operations (e.g. add edge, remove node, traverse)
Must be under 50 lines of code

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the generated code is syntactically correct.
Check that the code meets the constraints of using the specified graph library and including at least three graph operations.
Evaluate the correctness of the graph logic used in the code.
